## Motivation

<!-- Why is this change needed? Link any related issue (Fixes #N, Closes #N) or describe the user-facing problem it solves. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Mark with [x] — should match the prefix of your commit message (Conventional Commits). -->
- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code change that is neither a fix nor a feature
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore` — build, tooling, dependencies

## Changes

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest tests/backend/ -v` passes
- [ ] `ruff check backend/ tests/` clean
- [ ] `ruff format --check backend/ tests/` clean
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run test` passes (if frontend touched)
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run lint` clean (if frontend touched)
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run build` succeeds (if frontend touched)
- [ ] Manually verified in browser (if UI affected)

<!-- Describe any new tests added, or why none were needed. -->
